title: Malaysian Noodle Stir Fry
description: A quick and flavorful stir-fry made with sweet Malaysian noodles, mixed vegetables, and a hint of sesame oil.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the snow peas and cook for 2-3 minutes until tender.
Add the peas and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes until tender.
Add the Malaysian noodles and cook for 2-3 minutes until heated through.
In a small bowl, whisk together the sweet soy sauce and 1 tablespoon of water.
Pour the soy sauce mixture over the noodles and vegetables, and stir-fry for 1 minute.
Transfer the stir-fry to a serving dish and garnish with sesame seeds if desired.
